about.title: About JRA
about.mission: To represent, support, and develop the restaurant and hospitality sector in Jordan, elevating standards and connecting industry professionals.
about.vision: To be the premier hospitality association in the Arab world, recognized for driving quality, innovation, and sustainable growth.
about.founded: Founded under Jordanian regulations No. 47 of 2002
